summary: Iteration 28 - Blog Waraqa Feature Testing Complete. ALL 12 BACKEND TESTS PASSED. Frontend UI testing passed for all blog pages including public blog list, article detail pages, and admin blog management.
seed_data_creation: None - 3 blog articles already synced from R2 Blog/ folder
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog Waraqa feature fully implemented and tested. 3 articles synced: waraqa-370ah, waraqa-150ah, waraqa-179ah. All public endpoints work without auth. Admin endpoints require auth.

public_blog_list.details: Returns list of active blog articles (3 articles). No auth required. Shows title, tags, author, dates, epoch.

public_blog_article_370ah.details: Article #1: L'année où deux mondes naissent à la fois (370 AH / 980 CE, Époque bouyide)

public_blog_article_150ah.details: Article #2: Un imam meurt en prison. Le droit islamique, lui, ne mourra plus. (150 AH / 767 CE, Époque abbasside)

public_blog_article_179ah.details: Article #3: Un homme qui n'a jamais quitté Médine change le monde islamique pour toujours (179 AH / 795 CE)

admin_blog_sync_r2.details: Syncs blog articles from R2 Blog/ folder. Requires admin auth. Returns created/updated/deleted counts.

admin_blog_toggle.details: Toggles article active status. When inactive, article disappears from public list and single GET returns 404.

admin_blog_list.details: Admin page shows all articles with stats (3 Articles, 3 Published, 0 Drafts) and toggle switches.

blog_navigation.details: Nav link 'Blog' in header works. Blog cards clickable. Back button on article page works.

blog_seo.details: Document title updates to 'Article Title — Waraqa #N | Sijill Project' on article pages.

article_full_content.details: Full article includes: body_sections (array), context box, portrait box, thesis box, references, tags, author.

auth_protection.details: Admin endpoints return 401/403 without authentication. Public endpoints work without auth.

GET /api/blog.result: Returns 3 active blog articles with summary fields (id, series, number, date_ah, date_ce, epoch, title, tags, author, seo_description)

GET /api/blog/waraqa-370ah.result: Returns full article with all fields including body_sections array, context, portrait, thesis, references

GET /api/admin/blog (with auth).result: Returns all 3 articles including inactive ones
